tips_en: Start with the Qwen-Image-2.0 paper for a high-impact overview of unified multimodal generation and editing. Its use of RLHF and iterative multi-stage distillation creates a natural methodological bridge to TMAS’s hybrid-reward multi-agent feedback loops and PaperFit’s vision-based closed-loop document optimization.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 Qwen-Image-2.0 论文，以快速把握统一多模态生成与编辑的前沿进展。该工作采用的 RLHF 迭代训练与多阶段蒸馏，在方法论上与 TMAS 的混合奖励多智能体反馈机制以及 PaperFit 的视觉闭环文档优化形成了有趣的呼应。
